persistence.serialization: JSON with custom SetEncoder/object_hook for set/deque support

files.rp-phrases.json: RP commands for reply messages (dict[str, str])
files.botinfo.md: Bot info text for 'пибот био' command

files.logging_settings.py: Custom logging with colorized console output, token censoring, file handler

source.pibot.py: Main bot code (1119 lines, class PiBot)

initialization.llm: Initialized via self._init_llm() — reads personality.md and groq-key
initialization.commands: Registered in self._register_commands() — populates self.commands dict

message_processing_order.1_pre_check: Block banned users, filter old messages (>120s unless starts with 'пибот'). Implemented in PiBot._pre_check().
message_processing_order.2_commands: If text starts with 'пибот ', parse subcommand via PiBot._handle_command(). Dev_only commands check dev_ids; regular commands check rank against CommandConfig.value.
message_processing_order.3_ignored_check: If user is in trigger-spam timeout (ignored_until), drop message via is_user_ignored().
message_processing_order.4_rp_commands: If reply message and text matches key in rp-phrases.json, format and respond via PiBot._handle_rp().
message_processing_order.5_trigger_phrases: Exact match in phrases.json (supports __botinfo__, __changelog__, __commandlist__ via SPECIAL_RESPONSES dict). Handled by PiBot._handle_phrase().
message_processing_order.6_chance_trigger: Messages starting with 'пибот инфа' return random 0-100. Handled by PiBot._handle_chance().
message_processing_order.7_ai_response: If @bot_username mentioned, send chat context to Groq LLM via PiBot._handle_llm(). 60s timeout, retry up to 3x on 429/5xx with exponential backoff.

command_system.storage: dict CommandConfig: dataclass with fields handler (Callable), value (int), dev_only (bool)
command_system.access_check: If dev_only=True, only user in dev_ids can execute via PiBot.dev_ids. Else user_rank <= command.value.

2.name: Admin+
2.description: Appointed by Owner via 'пибот ранг 2 для @user'

rank_system.determination: PiBot.get_user_rank(): 1) Check if Telegram owner (rank 1). 2) Check stored ranks in chat_data['ranks']. 3) Check if Telegram admin (rank 3). 4) Default rank 4.
rank_system.assignment_rules: Cannot change Owner's rank. Cannot assign rank >= your own. Telegram admins cannot be set to rank 4; non-admins cannot be set to ranks 2 or 3.

кинь.description: Telegram ban user with revoke_messages=True + add to in-memory self.banned_users (synced to bot_data). Supports 'в гулаг' prefix or direct @user.

верни.description: Telegram unban user (only_if_banned=True) + remove from self.banned_users

ранг.description: Change user rank (n = 2, 3, 4). Cannot change Owner's rank, assign rank >= your own, or set admins to rank 4.

сотри.description: Delete last n tracked messages from per-chat deque (thread-safe via asyncio.Lock). Continues on API errors, reports total deleted. Batches of 100.

кикни.description: Kick user (ban + unban). Checks immunity via target_immune_to_mkb().

мут.description: Mute user for n minutes (float, min 0.5). No n = indefinite mute. Checks immunity.

размут.description: Unmute user. No immunity check — unmute bypasses target_immune_to_mkb.

заблокируй.description: Add user ID to self.banned_users (synced to bot_data). No Telegram interaction. Only for dev_ids.

dev_id_system.purpose: Elevated access for /пибот заблокируй command only
dev_id_system.check: If subcommand has dev_only=True and user_id in self.dev_ids (in-memory set loaded at startup), execute. No rank fallback.

banned_users_system.storage: In-memory set self.banned_users, initialized from bot_data['banned_users'] in post_init
banned_users_system.check: Banned users are blocked at _pre_check() and track_all_messages() — no triggers, RP, commands, or AI

modification.кинь/выкинь: adds target to self.banned_users + Telegram ban with revoke_messages=True
modification.верни: removes target from self.banned_users + Telegram unban with only_if_banned=True
modification.заблокируй: adds target to self.banned_users without Telegram interaction (dev_only)

llm.algorithm: Sliding window per chat_id with asyncio.Lock
llm.storage: dict self.llm_rate_limiters[chat_id], cleaned hourly via self._cleanup_caches job

trigger_spam.penalty: User ignored for 120 seconds, bot responds 'Ой всё' via is_user_ignored()

telegram_mute.trigger: >5 messages in 1 second (non-trigger, non-RP messages only)
telegram_mute.warning: 6-9 messages: single warning message (tracked via spam_warned per user)
telegram_mute.action: >9 messages: restrictChatMember with NO_PERMISSIONS for 60 seconds

age_filter.exception: Messages starting with 'пибот' prefix bypass the age filter

rp_system.trigger: Reply to a message with exact text matching a key (no prefix required)
rp_system.example: User A replies to B with 'обнять' → bot responds: 'A нежно обнял B'

ai_system.trigger: Reply to any message with @bot_username mention, or any message in private chat
ai_system.context: Last 20 messages from chat_data['llm_history'] (trimmed at startup in post_init)
ai_system.retry: 3 attempts with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s) on HTTP 429, 500, 502, 503, 504

typing.reason: PTB types many attributes as Optional; code handles None at runtime

message_processing.PiBot._pre_check: Banned user check, age filter. Returns False to drop message silently.
message_processing.PiBot._handle_command: Parse 'пибот ' prefix, lookup CommandConfig in self.commands, check dev_only or rank, execute handler.
message_processing.PiBot._handle_rp: Reply message + key in self.rp_commands → format {mention1}/{mention2} and respond.
message_processing.PiBot._handle_phrase: Key in self.phrases → respond. Supports SPECIAL_RESPONSES for __botinfo__/__changelog__/__commandlist__.
message_processing.PiBot._handle_llm: @mention detection, per-chat LLM rate limit, build history, call ask_llm with retry logic.
message_processing.PiBot.track_all_messages: Group -1 handler. Tracks message IDs in deque, username_map for @resolution, spam detection with progressive warning/mute.
message_processing.PiBot.safe_reply: Reply with error handling + message ID tracking via track_id.
message_processing.PiBot.track_id: Append message ID to per-chat deque with MAX_TRACKED_MESSAGES limit, thread-safe via per-chat asyncio.Lock.

rank_system.PiBot.get_user_rank: Determine user's rank (1-4): check Telegram owner → stored ranks → Telegram admin → fallback to 4.
rank_system.PiBot.target_immune_to_mkb: Check if target has rank <= RANK_ADMIN (immune to mute/kick/ban).

command_handlers.PiBot.handle_nuke: пибот сотри n — delete n messages with batch processing, thread-safe
command_handlers.PiBot.handle_ban: пибот кинь [в гулаг] @user — accepts both syntaxes with _strip_gulag_prefix
command_handlers.PiBot.handle_mute: пибот мут @user [n] — parse optional duration suffix
command_handlers.PiBot.handle_rank: пибот ранг n для @user — prevents privilege escalation, validates Telegram admin status
command_handlers.PiBot.handle_block: пибот заблокируй <id|@user> — dev_only, no Telegram interaction
command_handlers.PiBot.handle_rank_list: пибот ранги — lists users with ranks 2 and 3

persistence.SQLitePersistence: PTB BasePersistence subclass. JSON serialization with SetEncoder. Stores in bot_data.db.
persistence.SetEncoder: json.JSONEncoder subclass: converts set to {'__type__': 'set', '__items__': list} and deque similarly.
persistence._object_hook: json.loads object_hook: reconstructs set and deque from their serialized forms.

utilities._get_msg_lock: Returns per-chat asyncio.Lock for safe deque access
utilities._get_llm_rate_limiter: Returns per-chat RateLimiter (3 calls/60s) for LLM
utilities._cleanup_caches: Hourly job: remove stale entries from self.msg_locks and self.llm_rate_limiters
utilities._resolve_by_username: Helper: lookup username in username_map, return User or None
utilities._strip_gulag_prefix: Helper: strip 'в гулаг ' or 'вгулаг ' prefix, return remaining string or None
Helper: strip 'в гулаг ' or 'вгулаг ' prefix from params for handle_ban
utilities.resolve_user: Resolve @username, text mention, or reply target to User object
utilities.is_user_ignored: Check if user is in trigger-spam timeout period
utilities.track_trigger_spam: Track trigger phrase frequency with sliding window, return True if limit exceeded
utilities.ask_llm: Call Groq with system prompt + history. 60s timeout, 3 retries on 429/5xx with exponential backoff.
utilities._read_text_file_async: Generic async text file reader for botinfo/changelog/commandlist
